title: BHU CHS SET Admit Card 2026 - Overview

detail.title: BHU CHS SET Admit Card 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: BHU CHS SET Admit Card 2026 is out at bhuonline.in. Download CHS School Entrance Test hall ticket for Class 9 & 11, check exam dates, exam pattern and key instructions.

content.text: BHU CHS SET Admit Card 2026 has been released on 11 April 2026 at bhuonline.in for Class 9 and Class 11 admission to Central Hindu Boys School (CHBS) and Central Hindu Girls School (CHGS), and candidates can now download their hall ticket using their registration number and date of birth.

sections.heading: BHU CHS SET Admit Card 2026 - Overview

content.text: In this article, you will find the direct admit card download link, exam dates, exam schedule, exam pattern highlights, basic eligibility, exam day instructions, official links and FAQs to help students and parents complete the BHU School Entrance Test (SET) process smoothly.

rows: BHU School Entrance Test (SET) 2026 for CHS Class 9 & 11 admission
Central Hindu Boys School (CHBS) & Central Hindu Girls School (CHGS)

sections.heading: Direct BHU CHS SET Admit Card 2026 Download Link

content.text: BHU has activated the online link to download BHU CHS SET admit card 2026 only through the official entrance portal. Candidates who successfully submitted their application form can download their hall ticket by logging in with their registration details.

items: Official BHU SET website (School Entrance Test): bhuonline.in
BHU CHS SET admit card login portal: bhuschool1.ucanapply.com (candidate login panel)
The admit card will not be sent by post; it must be downloaded and printed online.

content.text: You can use the direct secure login link provided by BHU to access the admit card page and then enter your registration number and date of birth to download the hall ticket.

sections.heading: BHU CHS SET 2026 Important Dates

content.text: Knowing all the important dates helps candidates avoid missing any major event such as admit card, exam, answer key and result.
Candidates are advised to keep checking bhuonline.in and the official SET Bulletin 2026 for any change or update in the schedule.

sections.heading: BHU CHS SET Exam Schedule 2026 - Class 9 & Class 11

content.text: The BHU School Entrance Test 2026 for CHS is conducted on different dates for different classes and streams.

sections.heading: How to Download BHU CHS SET Admit Card 2026 Online

content.text: Downloading the BHU CHS admit card is an easy process that can be completed in a few minutes if you have your registration details ready.
Step-by-Step Process to Download BHU CHS Admit Card

items: Visit the official BHU entrance portal bhuonline.in on your mobile or computer browser.
On the homepage, click on the “School Entrance Test (SET) - 2026” link under the school admissions section.
Click on the “SET 2026 Admit Card” or “Admit Card/Login” option for Class 9 & 11.
You will be redirected to the BHU school login page (bhuschool1.ucanapply.com).
Enter your registration number / application ID and date of birth or password in the required fields.
Click on the “Submit” or “Login” button to access your BHU CHS SET admit card 2026.
Check all details printed on the admit card, including your name, class, stream, exam date, exam centre and photograph.
Download the hall ticket in PDF format and take 2-3 clear A4-size printouts for exam use.

content.text: It is advisable to save a soft copy of the admit card in your email or cloud storage as a backup in case the printed copy is misplaced or damaged before the exam.
Details Required to Download BHU CHS SET Hall Ticket
Keep the following details handy while downloading the hall ticket:

items: Registration number / application ID generated at the time of online application.
Password or date of birth, as used during registration.
Access to your registered mobile number or email ID to receive any communication or OTP if prompted by the portal.

content.text: Only those candidates whose BHU application form was successfully submitted will be able to download the admit card from the portal.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on BHU CHS SET Admit Card 2026

content.text: Candidates should carefully verify all details mentioned on the BHU CHS SET admit card immediately after download.
Important details include:

items: Candidate’s name, photograph and signature.
Registration number, roll number, class (Class 9 / Class 11) and stream (Arts/Commerce/Biology/Mathematics).
Exam date, day, reporting time and duration of the test.
Exam centre name, complete address and centre code.
Important exam day instructions and guidelines for candidates.

content.text: If there is any mismatch in personal details, category, class or exam centre, candidates should immediately contact the BHU helpline or the details given in the SET Bulletin 2026 to seek correction before the exam.

sections.heading: BHU CHS SET Exam Pattern 2026 (Brief Overview)

content.text: The BHU School Entrance Test for CHS is conducted in offline mode with objective-type questions to assess the academic readiness of students for Class 9 and Class 11.

items: Mode of exam: Offline, OMR-based pen and paper test.
Question type: Objective type multiple-choice questions (MCQs).
For Class 9, questions typically cover subjects like Hindi, English, Mathematics, Science and Social Science / General knowledge as per the notified syllabus.
For Class 11, questions are based on relevant subjects for the chosen stream (Arts, Commerce, Biology, Mathematics) as per SET Bulletin 2026.
Duration of exam: Generally 2 hours, as reflected by the 8 AM-10 AM schedule in the official notification.

content.text: Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the official SET Bulletin 2026 PDF for complete exam pattern, syllabus and marking scheme details.

sections.heading: BHU CHS SET 2026 Eligibility - Quick Recap

content.text: Although the application process is over, many students and parents still search for eligibility conditions while checking admit cards and exam details.
Class 9 Eligibility - Key Points

items: The candidate must have passed Class 8 from a recognized school in the previous academic year.
Age limit and minimum marks criteria are defined in the official SET Bulletin 2026 and must be fulfilled as on the specified cut-off date.
Reservation rules for SC, ST, OBC, EWS and other categories are followed as per BHU and Government of India norms.

content.text: Class 11 Eligibility - Key Points

items: The candidate must have passed Class 10 or equivalent examination from a recognized board.
Stream-wise subject combinations and minimum marks are prescribed separately for Arts, Commerce, Biology and Mathematics streams in the SET Bulletin 2026.
Candidates must ensure they meet all academic and age criteria for the chosen stream before appearing for admission counselling.

content.text: The points above are a summarized reference; for exact numbers (age limits, percentage etc.), please refer strictly to the official SET Bulletin 2026.

sections.heading: Important Instructions for BHU CHS SET Exam Day

content.text: BHU issues clear instructions for students appearing in the CHS entrance exam to maintain fairness and discipline at exam centres.
Key instructions include:

items: Carry a printed BHU CHS SET admit card 2026 and a valid photo ID proof (Aadhaar card, school ID, passport etc.) to the exam centre.
Reach the exam centre at least 30-45 minutes before the reporting time to complete security and verification formalities.
Do not carry mobile phones, smart watches, calculators, earphones, books, written notes or any electronic gadgets inside the examination hall.
Use only the allowed pen type (generally black or blue ballpoint pen) as mentioned in the admit card instructions for filling the OMR sheet.
Follow all instructions given by the invigilators; any unfair means can lead to cancellation of candidature and debarment from future exams.

content.text: Parents should brief their children about exam centre location in advance and ensure they carry all required documents on the exam day.

sections.heading: BHU CHS SET Result 2026 and Next Steps

content.text: After the entrance test, BHU will declare the BHU CHS SET result 2026 in online mode on the official website.

items: The SET 2026 result is expected to be announced in the second week of June 2026.
Candidates will be able to check their result and merit status on bhuonline.in under the School Entrance Test (SET) section.
Following the result, BHU will publish counselling and admission schedules for Central Hindu Boys School and Central Hindu Girls School, with separate dates for Class 9 and Class 11 streams.
Final admission will be offered based on merit, availability of seats, reservation rules and verification of original documents.

content.text: If you plan to publish a separate detailed result article, you can internally link it from this section once the result is declared.

sections.heading: BHU CHS SET 2026 - Official Links

content.text: For authenticity and quick access, candidates should always rely on official BHU portals and documents.

items: BHU SET/ CHS official website (School Entrance Test):Click Here
BHU CHS admit card login portal: Click Here (candidate login panel).
SET Bulletin 2026 (English PDF): Click Here.
BHU main website: Click Here

content.text: Candidates should cross-check any information from third-party websites with these official sources to avoid misinformation.
